feed.title: The Git Times
feed.subtitle: AI-generated newspaper for builders — daily coverage of trending GitHub projects

entry.title: DeerFlow 2.0 Rewrites the Playbook for Long-Horizon AI Agents
entry.summary: “Tools for conviviality are those which give each person who uses them the greatest opportunity to enrich the environment with the fruits of their vision.” — Ivan Illich

entry.title: GoClaw Delivers Secure Multi-Tenant AI Agent Platform
entry.summary: “New technology is not additive; it is ecological. A new medium does not add something; it changes everything.” — Neil Postman

entry.title: colleague-skill
entry.summary: “For a successful technology, reality must take precedence over public relations, for nature cannot be fooled.” — Richard Feynman

entry.title: Codex Plugin Brings OpenAI Reviews to Claude Code
entry.summary: “The medium is the message.” — Marshall McLuhan

entry.title: Lightweight CLI Proxy Slashes LLM Token Costs for Developers
entry.summary: “Technology is not a neutral tool. It is a system that carries its own values.” — Ursula Franklin

entry.title: CC Switch Integrates GitHub Copilot in Major Desktop Update
entry.summary: “Progress imposes not only new possibilities for the future but new restrictions.” — Norbert Wiener

entry.title: Open Source AI Dashboard Creates Unified Global Intelligence Monitoring System
entry.summary: “The purpose of a system is what it does.” — Stafford Beer

entry.title: AI Skill Tracks 30-Day Trends Across Social and Tech Platforms
entry.summary: “The art challenges the technology, and the technology inspires the art.” — John Lasseter

entry.title: Pascal Editor Brings Precision 3D Building Design to the Browser
entry.summary: “We are called to be architects of the future, not its victims.” — Buckminster Fuller

entry.title: DeerFlow Orchestrates Sub-Agents for Complex Research and Coding Tasks
entry.summary: “The factory of the future will have only two employees, a man and a dog. The man will be there to feed the dog. The dog will be there to keep the man from touching the equipment.” — Warren Bennis

entry.title: MoneyPrinterV2 Automates Online Income Generation Through Smart Tools
entry.summary: “Consider what the world would lose if each mind were to do its own indexing.” — Vannevar Bush

entry.title: OpenViking Applies Filesystem Model to AI Agent Context
entry.summary: “Everywhere we remain unfree and chained to technology, whether we passionately affirm or deny it.” — Martin Heidegger

entry.title: Offline AI Knowledge System Prepares Users for Disconnected Worlds
entry.summary: “Technology is anything that wasn't around when you were born.” — Alan Kay

entry.title: Mole V1.30 Supercharges Mac Cleanup with Edge-Case Hardening
entry.summary: “The best material model of a cat is another, or preferably the same, cat.” — Norbert Wiener

entry.title: Everything Claude Code Supercharges AI Coding Agents into Production Beasts
entry.summary: “We shape our tools, and thereafter our tools shape us.” — Marshall McLuhan

entry.title: AIRI's Alpha Release Polishes Game-Playing AI Companions for Everyday Use
entry.summary: “We are as gods and might as well get good at it.” — Stewart Brand

entry.title: Superpowers Framework Turns AI Coding Agents into Methodical Engineers
entry.summary: “The information you have is not the information you want. The information you want is not the information you need.” — Neil Postman

entry.title: Attention Residuals Let Transformers Selectively Tap Deeper Layer Wisdom
entry.summary: “We live in a society exquisitely dependent on science and technology, in which hardly anyone knows anything about science and technology.” — Carl Sagan

entry.title: Lightpanda Delivers Zig-Built Headless Browser for Lightning-Fast AI Automation
entry.summary: “We drive into the future using only our rearview mirror.” — Marshall McLuhan

entry.title: Lightpanda: Zig-Powered Headless Browser Turbocharges AI Automation
entry.summary: “Technology is a gift of God. After the gift of life it is perhaps the greatest of God's gifts.” — Freeman Dyson
